title: HIV Prevalence by State (Sentinel Surveillance 2010-11)
description: State/UT-wise HIV prevalence in different population groups based on HIV Sentinel Surveillance up to 2010-11

title: HIV Patients on ART (2015-2017)
description: State-wise details of HIV patients on ART treatment from 2015 to 2017

title: HIV Positive Percentage (Men & Women)
description: Percentage of HIV positive men and women (age 15-49) tested by state in India

title: Tobacco Usage among TB Patients
description: Dataset on tobacco usage status among TB patients and screening statistics

title: TB Notifications by State (2020-2021)
description: State/UT-wise TB notification including DR-TB during 2020 and 2021

title: TB Cases and Deaths (2021-2024)
description: Year-wise number of TB cases and TB deaths reported under NTEP from 2021 to 2024

title: TB Cases Notified (2020-2024)
description: Year-wise TB cases notified under National TB Elimination Programme (NTEP)

title: Diabetes Patients in India (2015-2019)
description: Estimated diabetes and juvenile diabetes patients in India based on International Diabetes Federation

title: Diabetes Prevalence (NFHS 2005-06)
description: Number of men and women (age 15-49) per 100,000 reporting diabetes

title: NCD Programme Funding (NHM)
description: Funding released for non-communicable diseases (including diabetes) under NHM
